message:
The other day, I was chatting with a friend about our family go-bags. I had been nudging her to put one together, and she kept saying, "Oh, we’ll be fine!" Fast forward to an unexpected storm warning, and guess who was scrambling to throw things together last minute? Yep! I couldn’t help but feel a little smug as I offered her some extra flashlights and snacks from my well-prepared stash. 😊

It reminded me how nice it is to have our emergency plans and supplies in place. It’s not just about the big things; it’s those little moments that make all the difference when life throws a curveball. 

Have you ever had a "I told you so" moment when it comes to preparedness? Let’s hear your stories!
